intro.title: Base Template Plugin
intro.description: Explore the starter template plugin for PowerX and learn how to build reusable modules quickly.

overview.title: Template Overview
overview.description: Templates help you bootstrap new experiences with consistent structures and reusable content blocks.

cards.createDescription: Draft reusable templates that can be applied across multiple pages or workflows.
cards.automationDescription: Combine templates with automation to accelerate onboarding and delivery.
cards.analyticsDescription: Measure how templates are used and optimise collaboration in your team.

develop.title: Development Guide
develop.description: Understand the backend and frontend touch points for extending the template module.
develop.step1: Define the GORM model and migrations for template storage.
develop.step2: Expose repository and service layers for business logic.
develop.step3: Register HTTP APIs under /api/v1/templates with RBAC protection.
develop.step4: Connect the Nuxt pages to the APIs and polish the user experience.

crud.title: Template CRUD
crud.description: Manage demo templates with create, update and delete operations.

fields.name: Template Name
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose of this template

crud.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?

monthly.overviewHint: Track month-over-month trends and summarise key achievements.
